stemHtml: According to the 1999 Montreal Convention, when is an airline responsible for the passenger's checked baggage?

options.a: From entering the departure airport until leaving at the destination airport.
options.b: From the moment the baggage is stowed in the aircraft until off-loading it.
options.c: From the baggage check-in until its off-loading.
options.d: From the moment of the check-in until the passenger leaves the plane.
